faqs.question: Is your honey 100% raw and unprocessed?
faqs.answer: Yes — our honey is never heated or filtered beyond a simple strain, preserving its natural enzymes and pollen.

faqs.question: Do you deliver nationwide?
faqs.answer: Yes, we deliver across the country. Delivery time and charges are confirmed with you directly over WhatsApp.

faqs.question: How do I place an order?
faqs.answer: Add products to your cart, fill in your delivery details at checkout, and your order is sent to us instantly via WhatsApp.

faqs.question: Are your products Halal certified?
faqs.answer: Yes, all Heaven Naturals products are sourced and prepared in accordance with Halal standards.
